title: UROUTER_ASNRELOAD
text: UROUTER_ASNRELOAD Reload the Uniface Router’s assignment file. operation UROUTER_ASNRELOAD Parameters None. Return Values If successful, $status is set to 0. Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The privileged-user operation UROUTER_ASNRELOAD causes the Uniface Router to reread its assignment file. All settings are set to those specified in the assignment file. All dynamically altered values in the Uniface Router and the USTs are reset. Although all values are reset, only those values that pertain to starting and stopping servers have an effect. Changing the $DEFAULT_NET setting has no effect, because the Uniface Router that uses that setting is not re-executed. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
